hub.abc_desc: Record antecedent, behavior, and consequence observations
hub.obs_desc: Real-time interval, frequency, or duration recording
hub.overview_desc: Behavior trends, charts, and summary statistics
hub.interval_desc: Partial, whole, or momentary time sampling grid
hub.token_desc: Visual reinforcement board with customizable tokens
hub.hotspot_desc: Identify high-frequency behavior times across routines
hub.choice_desc: Student-facing visual choice cards for self-regulation
hub.audit_desc: 8-item classroom environment checklist with AI recommendations
hub.impact_desc: Quantify behavior frequency, duration, and annual cost
hub.datasheet_desc: Printable frequency, duration, ABC, or latency data sheets
hub.homenote_desc: AI-drafted parent communication with tone selector
hub.feasibility_desc: 5-question contextual fit assessment with AI recommendations
hub.gas_desc: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
hub.pocket_desc: Compact index-card BIP summary for clipboard carry
hub.abagraph_desc: Publication-standard graphs with phase lines, trend lines, and visual analysis
hub.bcbahandoff_desc: Data dashboard for BCBAs + printable handoff packet for consultation
hub.biascheck_desc: Gently surfaces patterns in your data for reflection on potential implicit bias — growth, not guilt
hub.casestudy_desc: AI-generated case studies with 4-phase clinical reasoning and scoring
hub.commlog_desc: Two-way family contact tracker with follow-ups — ensure no family falls through the cracks
hub.condprob_desc: Foreground vs background probability analysis to validate ABC hypotheses with data
hub.consent_desc: Customizable consent form for parent data exchange — edit, print, share as JSON
hub.counseling_desc: AI role-play with student personas for counseling practice
hub.cultural_desc: 8-question pause-and-reflect checklist before interpreting behavior through a cultural humility lens
hub.cumrecord_desc: Classic Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph — the heritage of ABA data display
hub.deescalate_desc: Breathing exercises, visual timers, sensory breaks, and grounding — real-time calming support
hub.dtt_desc: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.effectsize_desc: Calculate Tau-U, NAP, and PND to quantify intervention effectiveness with visual phase comparison
hub.familyvoice_desc: Structured form for families to share observations, cultural insights, and celebrations — with AI translation
hub.fcttemplate_desc: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
hub.homelog_desc: Simplified parent-friendly behavior logging with everyday language
hub.iepprep_desc: AI-generated meeting preparation packet with data summary, talking points, and next steps
hub.latency_desc: Stimulus-to-response time measurement with mean, median, and range statistics
hub.maintenance_desc: Track skill retention post-mastery and generalization across settings, people, and materials
hub.mtss_desc: Visual 3-tier pyramid for managing multi-tiered supports with AI-powered tier placement recommendations
hub.nlabc_desc: Type or paste observation notes in everyday English — AI structures them into ABC entries automatically
hub.obscoach_desc: Real-time coaching on your data collection quality — identifies gaps, suggests improvements, and rates your data
hub.pdpath_desc: Guided onboarding modules for building ABA skills step-by-step
hub.qualitycheck_desc: AI-powered review of your ABC entries with specific improvement suggestions
hub.quick_launch_hint: Core clinical tools — one tap access
hub.reinforcement_desc: Structured motivation survey — identify what drives each student across 6 categories
hub.relmap_desc: Visual diagram of student connections — trusted adults, peers, family, mentors — with gap analysis
hub.restorative_desc: Step-by-step scripts for harm repair, community circles, and reintegration conferences
hub.sandbox_desc: Load simulated student data for PD, pre-service training, or learning ABA without real students
hub.selfcheck_desc: Student-facing mood check-in and reflection journal — capturing their voice
hub.taskanalysis_desc: Break skills into teachable steps with forward, backward, or total-task chaining and prompt tracking
hub.treatintegrity_desc: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed — component-level fidelity tracking
hub.trends_desc: SVG charts showing intensity trends, setting frequency, and day/time heatmap
hub.cantdowontdo_desc: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.
hub.competingpathways_desc: Map desired and replacement behaviors against the problem path.
hub.functionquiz_desc: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.
hub.practicum_desc: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.
overview.empty_desc: Start collecting ABC data or run live observations to see trends here.
hotspot.tap_hint: Tap a cell to increment. Click routine name to edit.
quick_fill_hint: AI will parse your description into the fields below. You can then edit manually.
quiz_fba_purpose: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
quick_fill_placeholder: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
reinforce_step_1: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_2: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_3: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
record_tip_1: Include what happened before, during, and after the behavior
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.eg_handwashing_tying_shoes_morning_ro: e.g. Handwashing, Tying Shoes, Morning Routine
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu: 🎯 Target behavior (what you want to reduce)
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a: Type your response here. Be thorough and use professional language...
